scripts.publish-packages: bun run build && bun changeset publish
scripts.publish-packages:dry: bun run build && bun pm pack --filename /private/tmp/quarkcss-core.tgz --cwd packages/core && bun pm pack --filename /private/tmp/quarkcss-react.tgz --cwd packages/react && bun pm pack --filename /private/tmp/quarkcss-solid.tgz --cwd packages/solid && bun pm pack --filename /private/tmp/quarkcss-van.tgz --cwd packages/van
